_comment: Recorded deterministic transcripts — the prototype's stand-in for the offline provider's fixtures. Keyed by task function name. Re-record, never hand-edit, when task docstrings change (DESIGN ground rule 3).
summarize:
- Shepherd turns typed Python functions into model-backed tasks.
- The docstring is the instruction; the return type is the contract.
- Runs are recorded, so behavior is debuggable after the fact.
oversee: Login feature landed. The worker's first attempt failed 2 tests, so oversee reverted that step and retried; the retry passed all 41.

triage_change.rationale: auth.py change tightens an admin check on a security-sensitive path

write_review.summary: Tightens the admin gate in auth.py by requiring an explicit role check; low blast radius, no API change.
